concerns.text: Tasks T009-T014 mandate modifying `spec.md` directly (e.g., 'Update spec.md FR-003 to replace [deferred]...'). This violates the 'Single Source of Truth' and 'Versioning Discipline' principles. The spec is the authoritative source; tasks cannot retroactively rewrite it. These tasks should be removed or converted to a kickback request to update the spec before task generation.

FR-006 mandates 'Repeated Measures ANOVA'. While Task T043 implements LMM (correcting the spec), there is no task explicitly tagged or described to 'Update spec.md FR-006 to mandate LMM' as a formal requirement change. The implementation deviates from the spec without a corresponding task to align the spec, creating a traceability gap.

The spec assumes 'no authentication barriers' for the MP API. Task T019 implements `MP_API_KEY` configuration, but there is no task to update the spec's Assumptions section to reflect this requirement. The spec remains factually incorrect regarding the environment.

SC-001 only measures 'RMSE and MAE'. Tasks T037 and T045 implement 'Predictive Variance' and 'Calibration Slope' (per Constitution VI), but there is no task to update SC-001 to include these metrics. The success criteria in the spec are incomplete relative to the implemented tasks.

FR-007 mentions 'trend stability' but lacks the explicit 'slope variance < 10%' metric. Task T047 implements this metric, but there is no task to update FR-007 to explicitly include the <10% threshold. The spec requirement is ambiguous compared to the task implementation.

FR-003 refers to '[deferred]' percentages of the 'full dataset'. Task T031 clarifies the baseline is a '30k RSS', but there is no task to update FR-003 to explicitly define the 30k RSS baseline instead of the full dataset. The spec remains ambiguous.
